text_template: Each episode, I sit down with high-achieving women to discuss the pursuit of excellence without apology. This week on the show, clinical psychologist and founder Dr. Becky Kennedy and I unpack what it really means to raise kids today. I think parenting is the most important job in the world and the one that has the most impact on your world and the world. It is non-stop. Check out Pretty Tough Podcast, new episodes on Wednesdays. You can watch it or listen in your favorite podcast app.
intro_variants: Each episode, I sit down with high-achieving women to discuss the pursuit of excellence without apology.
